title: CampaignRubric
description: Structured output emitted by every agent/operator campaign run. Contains scored rubric criteria plus freeform findings.

campaign.description: Human-readable name of the campaign run (e.g. 'operator-crud-rest-auth').

workstream.description: Optional workstream identifier such as product-validation or website-review.

capability.description: Optional capability or lane identifier covered by this campaign.

environmentClass.description: Optional environment class for the lane, such as ci-containerized or live-external.

authPattern.description: Optional auth pattern used during the campaign.

artifactPaths.description: Optional artifact paths emitted by the campaign.

runAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the campaign started.

pass.description: True if and only if every criterion in 'criteria' passed.

criteria.description: Ordered list of rubric checkpoints evaluated during the campaign.

knownGaps.description: Optional list of documented feature gaps that are expected to not yet pass.

findings.description: Freeform observations collected during the campaign run.

id.description: Short unique identifier for this criterion (e.g. 'catalog-tool-count').

description.description: Human-readable description of what is being checked.

expected.description: The expected value or condition expressed as a string.

actual.description: The observed value at the time of the check (omitted on pass when not needed).

note.description: Optional free-text note providing additional context.

id.description: Short unique identifier for the gap (e.g. 'gap-streaming-responses').

description.description: What capability or scenario is not yet supported.

reason.description: Why this is a known gap (missing feature, design decision, etc.).

stillFails.description: True if the gap still exists; false means the gap has been resolved.
